scripts.dev: NODE_ENV=dev concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.production: env -i PATH="$PATH" HOME="$HOME" docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env.prod up -d --build
scripts.start:backend: cd backend && NODE_ENV=dev npm run dev
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
